name: alfolab-market
description: AlfoLab's Claude Code marketplace — small, sharp developer plugins.

plugins.name: cli-autocomplete
plugins.description: Generate and refresh rich, git-style categorized zsh tab-completions for any CLI by introspecting its --help.

plugins.name: research-this
plugins.description: Research any topic — scientific, mathematical, economic, political, historical. /research-this builds a cited knowledge collection; /overview-this gives a fast grounded overview with a peek at the deep parts.
